first.diff:
--- a/app/page.jsx
+++ b/app/page.jsx
@@ -1,10 +1,10 @@
-import styles from './page.module.sass';
-
-export default function Page() {
-  return <main>
-    <article className={styles.card} data-probe="card" data-identity="card">Card</article>
-    <button className={styles.action} data-identity="action">Toggle details</button>
-    <section className={styles.responsive} data-probe="responsive-layout" data-identity="responsive">Responsive</section>
-  </main>;
-}
 
+import styles from './page.module.sass';
+
+export default function Page() {
+  return <main>
+    <article className="hover:bg-[rgb(210,_220,_230)] p-[13px] text-[rgb(20,_30,_40)]" data-probe="card" data-identity="card">Card</article>
+    <button className="focus-visible:[outline-offset:3px] focus:[outline:2px_solid_rgb(30,_90,_150)]" data-identity="action">Toggle details</button>
+    <section className="[@media_(min-width:700px)]:w-[200px] w-[100px]" data-probe="responsive-layout" data-identity="responsive">Responsive</section>
+  </main>;
+}
 
--- a/app/page.module.sass
+++ b/app/page.module.sass
@@ -1,17 +1,8 @@
-.card
-  padding: 13px
-  color: rgb(20, 30, 40)
-.card:hover
-  background-color: rgb(210, 220, 230)
-.action:focus
-  outline: 2px solid rgb(30, 90, 150)
-.action:focus-visible
-  outline-offset: 3px
-.responsive
-  width: 100px
-@media (min-width: 700px)
-  .responsive
-    width: 200px
-.retained
-  display: block
 
+
+
+
+
+
+.retained
+  display: block
